tagline: Real photos, shot on a real camera, by a human.
//: SOURCE OF TRUTH for the photo-packs registry (modeled on candidates/bababoefoe/site/editions.json). PUBLIC REPO: `samples` may ONLY list downsized (<=2048px longest edge) WATERMARKED preview files under `sample_dir`. Full-res originals and sold tiers NEVER live in this repo — they live on the owner's storefront/stock platform. `tiers` lists what the SOLD pack contains (for the listing), not files committed here. `base_url` is where a built gallery would be served on GitHub Pages. Real sample filenames slot into the empty `samples` arrays; validate_samples.py enforces the size/dimension/naming rules.
watermark_note: Every committed sample is a <=2048px, visibly watermarked PREVIEW — not a usable wallpaper and not for redistribution.

packs.title: Small Worlds
packs.description: Extreme macro of bugs and insects — the differentiated wedge.

packs.title: Six-Legged Neighbours
packs.description: Common garden insects up close — bees, beetles, spiders, dragonflies.

packs.title: Dutch Skies
packs.description: Big-sky, cloud and weather scenes over open landscape.

packs.title: Golden Hours
packs.description: Sunsets and golden-hour light — included, but the most saturated pack.
